---
jupyter: python3
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
    toc-title: Table of contents
    self-contained: true
editor: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

![](https://datasciencebocconi.github.io/Images/Other/logoBocconi.png)


# Preliminaries

## String manipulation

## Regular expressions

# Text mining


## The IMDB dataset

assd

#### Description

asdad

#### Import the data


```{python}
# Import basic libraries
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
```

```{python}
# Let us import the dataset (it may require some time)
imdb = pd.read_csv('https://datasciencebocconi.github.io/Data/IMDB.csv')
print(imdb.shape) # Size of the dataset
```

```{python}
imdb.head(20)
```

## Data cleaning
